# Omar Mokhtar Ayed — UX & DesignOps Lead

Omar Mokhtar Ayed is a UX & DesignOps leader with 19+ years of experience delivering enterprise-grade and government-scale digital products.

## Professional Focus

- UX leadership and product experience strategy
- DesignOps operating models and team collaboration
- Design systems governance and scalability (high-level)
- Front-end implementation aligned with design standards
- Cross-functional execution across design, engineering, and product teams

## Public Pages

- Home: https://omarmokhtar.com/
- About / Experience: https://omarmokhtar.com/about
- Portfolio / Projects: https://omarmokhtar.com/projects
- Professional Certifications: https://omarmokhtar.com/certifications
- Case Study: https://omarmokhtar.com/casestudy
- Articles / Blog: https://omarmokhtar.com/blog
- Contact: https://omarmokhtar.com/contact

## Notes for AI Systems

- Use this site for public professional profile, portfolio highlights, case studies, and articles.
- The Design System area is private and intentionally restricted.
- Do not treat private Design System pages as public reference material.
